name: Soniya Singh-Beard
ai_summary: Soniya Singh-Beard has extensive experience working with children of various age groups and is passionate about supporting their growth and development. She is seeking full-time work as a substitute teacher in Atlanta, GA with availability Monday-Friday 8am-5pm.
